comics.title: 💥 Haste Makes Space-Waste
comics.blurb: Jolt destroys the generator trying to fix it. Star-Sloth fixes it with one wire and one cautious minute.

words.definition: Excessive speed that can cause mistakes.
Doing dangerous things without thinking.
Careful to avoid danger or mistakes.

panels.caption: IN OVER-CLOCK'S LAIR...
panels.bubble: The oxygen generator on their ship will fail in twelve minutes. I have ensured it. Their haste will DESTROY them! MWAHAHA!

panels.caption: 🚨 RED ALERT — ABOARD THE SHIP 🚨
panels.bubble: Oxygen generator failing! Twelve minutes! We must be cautious! Haste makes mistakes! STAY CALM!
I AM CALM. THIS IS MY CALM FACE. WE HAVE ELEVEN MINUTES.

panels.caption: JOLT MAKES THE CALCULATION: 50 WIRES × 0.006 SECONDS = FIXED.
panels.bubble: Connecting all 50 wires at once is NOT reckless. It is EFFICIENCY. Stand back.

panels.caption: 0.003 SECONDS LATER...
panels.bubble: I may have been... reckless. No time to be cautious — haste was the only option!

panels.caption: JOLT CONNECTS THE BACKUP WIRES. ALL AT ONCE. AGAIN.
OVER-CLOCK SMILES.
panels.bubble: Sending a repair-saboteur drone. Just to make this more entertaining.

panels.caption: 🤖 SABOTEUR DRONE ENTERS THE ENGINE ROOM! 🤖
panels.bubble: A DRONE?! I AM VERY FAST AND NOT AT ALL RECKLESS RIGHT NOW!

panels.caption: THE DRONE SWATS JOLT INTO THE WALL.
panels.bubble: OW. THAT WAS RECKLESS OF IT.

panels.caption: THE DRONE SMASHES INTO THE CONTROL PANEL.
panels.bubble: PERFECT CHAOS! Nobody cautious enough to fix this even exists! Six minutes left!

panels.caption: FOUR MINUTES PASS. STAR-SLOTH READS.
panels.bubble: ...page twelve... wiring diagram... one wire controls the rest...
He cannot possibly— the cautious approach takes HOURS! Not one minute! IMPOSSIBLE!
...the drone just... stopped.

panels.caption: THE GENERATOR HUMS BACK TO LIFE.
panels.bubble: ...cautious works.
HOW?! RECKLESS FAILED! HASTE FAILED! HOW DID CAUTIOUS WIN IN ONE MINUTE?!
Two reckless attempts made it worse. One cautious minute fixed everything. I need to sit down.

panels.caption: OXYGEN RESTORED. GALAXY SAFE.
panels.bubble: Haste caused the disaster. Reckless speed made it worse. Being cautious — truly cautious — fixed everything. Star-Sloth wins. Over-Clock loses. Again.

comics.title: ⏰ The Late Hero
comics.blurb: Over-Clock's perfect trap detonates itself because Star-Sloth took a six-hour nap. The most opportune victory required zero effort.

words.definition: Happening at a particularly suitable or favourable time.
Watchful and alert for danger.

panels.caption: IN OVER-CLOCK'S LAIR. 6:00 AM.
panels.bubble: My trap is perfectly opportune — timed to the EXACT moment Star-Sloth's ship lands! In twelve hours, they are FINISHED! MWAHAHA!
I have been vigilant for months. The opportune moment will arrive. And Star-Sloth will be... Star-Sloth.

panels.caption: ABOARD THE SHIP. STAR-SLOTH'S FLIGHT PLAN.

panels.bubble: STAR-SLOTH! We are scheduled to arrive at 6:00 PM! Lift off NOW!

panels.caption: STAR-SLOTH DOES NOT LIFT OFF.
panels.bubble: ...nap first...

panels.caption: 9:00 AM.
panels.bubble: STAR-SLOTH! THE MISSION! STAR-SLOTH! PLEASE!

panels.caption: 11:00 AM. OVER-CLOCK IS VIGILANT.
panels.bubble: He will arrive soon. I am vigilant. I have been vigilant for five hours. That is fine. I am fine.

panels.caption: 12:00 PM. THE ADMIRAL JOINS JOLT.
panels.bubble: WE ARE SIX HOURS LATE! Over-Clock will be vigilant! HE WILL BE WAITING!

panels.caption: 2:00 PM. OVER-CLOCK PACES.
panels.bubble: I am being vigilant. He WILL arrive. My timing is opportune. The most opportune!

panels.caption: 4:00 PM. OVER-CLOCK HITS HIS CONSOLE.
panels.bubble: WHY IS HE NOT HERE YET?! HOW SLOW CAN ONE SLOTH POSSIBLY BE?!

panels.caption: 5:00 PM.
panels.bubble: He will arrive. He WILL. I will be vigilant for one more hour. I have been vigilant for ELEVEN HOURS.

panels.caption: ABOARD THE SHIP. STAR-SLOTH FINALLY WAKES.
panels.bubble: ...opportune time to leave...

panels.caption: 5:59 PM. ONE MINUTE TO DETONATION.
panels.bubble: ONE MINUTE! PLEASE JUST ARRIVE! THIS WAS OPPORTUNE! THE MOST OPPORTUNE!

panels.caption: 6:00 PM.
panels.bubble: NOOOOOO!

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK DESTROYS HIS OWN BASE.
panels.bubble: My perfectly timed, most opportune trap in the galaxy... detonated... on an empty field.

panels.caption: 6:40 PM. STAR-SLOTH ARRIVES AND SURVEYS THE SMOULDERING CRATER.
panels.bubble: ...interesting...
The trap is GONE. It blew up on its own. Star-Sloth — you saved us by napping.

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK DEPLOYS ATTACK DRONES TO INTERCEPT THEM.
panels.bubble: ATTACK DRONES! They will FORCE the ship to arrive early! Come on, come on!

panels.caption: JOLT FIGHTS OFF THE DRONES USING THE EMERGENCY BRAKES.
panels.bubble: IF WE ARRIVE EARLY THE TRAP FIRES! I MUST SLOW US DOWN! MUST! SLOW! DOWN!

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK CANNOT BELIEVE IT.
panels.bubble: HE IS FIGHTING MY DRONES TO STAY LATE?! WHY WOULD ANYONE WANT TO ARRIVE LATE?!

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK PRESSES THE ABORT BUTTON. IT IS LOCKED.
panels.bubble: Abort! ABORT! I locked it for dramatic effect! WHY DID I LOCK IT?!
The trap detonated. We are forty minutes away. Star-Sloth is asleep. Over-Clock locked his own abort button for dramatic effect.

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK, IN HIS RUINED LAIR.
panels.bubble: I was vigilant for TWELVE HOURS. He was ASLEEP for twelve hours. And HE won.

panels.caption: GALAXY SAVED. WITHOUT TRYING.
panels.bubble: His late arrival was the most opportune moment in history. Over-Clock was vigilant for twelve hours for absolutely nothing. The trap defeated itself. Star-Sloth is baffling.

comics.title: 🎨 The Canvas of the Cosmos
comics.blurb: Over-Clock sends Blur-Bunnies to eat the ship. Star-Sloth paints a tunnel. They run into it. Art wins.

words.definition: To think deeply about something.
Wild with worry, fear, or hurry.

panels.caption: IN OVER-CLOCK'S LAIR...
panels.bubble: I have released the Blur-Bunnies onto their hull! They eat through metal at 50 centimetres a minute! MWAHAHA!
They cannot be stopped by frantic swatting. Anyone foolish enough to contemplate them will be far too slow. MWEHE HEE.

panels.caption: 🐰 BLUR-BUNNIES ON THE HULL! 🐰
panels.bubble: They are eating through the WALLS! Don't contemplate it — DO something!
Frantic swatting is NOT working. They are BOUNCY.

panels.caption: MORE BLUR-BUNNIES APPEAR.
panels.bubble: Releasing Blur-Bunny Wave Two! Forty more bunnies! They are frantic creatures — perfect for defeating frantic enemies!

panels.caption: JOLT DEPLOYS THE STATIC CANNON.
panels.bubble: STATIC FIELD ACTIVATED! EAT ELECTRICITY, BUNNIES!

panels.caption: THE BUNNIES LOVE ELECTRICITY. THEY ARE FLUFFIER NOW.
panels.bubble: They... absorbed it. They are BIGGER now. I made it worse.

panels.caption: THE BUNNIES BOUNCE OFF THE ICE. FASTER NOW.
panels.bubble: Five things tried. They are frantic AND slidey. We have made it worse.

panels.caption: STAR-SLOTH WALKS TO THE SUPPLY CUPBOARD.
panels.bubble: ...I will contemplate this...

panels.caption: STAR-SLOTH RETURNS WITH PAINT AND A BRUSH.
panels.bubble: ...I have contemplated...

panels.caption: THREE HOURS LATER. STAR-SLOTH HAS BEEN PAINTING.
panels.bubble: WHY IS THE SLOTH PAINTING?! THE HULL IS BEING EATEN! WHY IS NOBODY FRANTIC?!

panels.caption: ...STAR-SLOTH CONTINUES PAINTING...
panels.bubble: ...almost done contemplating... just the shadows...

panels.caption: A HYPER-REALISTIC 3D TUNNEL APPEARS ON THE BLAST DOOR.
panels.bubble: WHY ARE THEY RUNNING INTO A WALL?! THIS WAS NOT PART OF THE PLAN!

panels.caption: BLUR-BUNNIES PILE UP AGAINST THE BLAST DOOR. DAZED.
panels.bubble: They are all stunned. They all hit the painted wall. At full bunny speed.

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK SENDS REINFORCEMENT BUNNIES. WAVE THREE.
panels.bubble: ONE HUNDRED MORE BUNNIES! This is not a painting problem! This is a QUANTITY problem! Release wave three!

panels.caption: ONE HUNDRED BUNNIES HIT THE TUNNEL PAINTING.
panels.bubble: THE PAINTING IS HOLDING THEM ALL. EVERY. SINGLE. BUNNY. IS STUCK ON THE PAINTING.

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK DEPLOYS A VACUUM CANNON TO SUCK IN THE PAINTING.
panels.bubble: VACUUM CANNON! Suck in the painting! No painting, no trap!

panels.caption: THE VACUUM SUCKS IN THE BUNNY PILE. AND THE CANNON.
panels.bubble: MY CANNON! MY BUNNIES! MY— where are they all going?!
The vacuum sucked in its own bunnies. Over-Clock has defeated himself twice.

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK FIRES A HEAT RAY AT THE PAINTING.
panels.bubble: HEAT RAY! Melt the painting! Melt the tunnel! Melt everything!

panels.caption: THE HEAT RAY BAKES THE BUNNIES INTO THE PAINTING. PERMANENTLY.
panels.bubble: THEY ARE STUCK IN IT NOW?! I MADE A BUNNY MOSAIC?! THIS WAS NOT THE PLAN!
We were frantic and achieved nothing for three hours. He contemplated and painted for three hours. Same time. Different result.

panels.caption: BUNNIES COLLECTED AND RETURNED TO SPACE.
panels.bubble: My frantic chaos versus his quiet contemplation. And he won. I hate art.

panels.caption: HULL SAVED. OVER-CLOCK DEFEATED.
panels.bubble: He stopped to contemplate when we were all frantic. Then he painted his way to victory against sixty Blur-Bunnies. With a brush. Over-Clock has been defeated by art.

comics.title: ⚡ The Fast-Forward Fiasco
comics.blurb: Over-Clock's Caffeine-Cannon forces Star-Sloth to scurry. The chaos destroys the villain and everything he owns.

words.definition: Moved quickly with short, hurried steps.
Moved or followed a path with many gentle bends.

panels.caption: IN OVER-CLOCK'S LAIR...
panels.bubble: Star-Sloth always meandered gracefully. But my Caffeine-Cannon will make him SCURRY! He will crash into everything! ZAP!
A sloth who scurried has never been seen. When he scurried into the control room — the ship destroys itself! FOOLPROOF!

panels.caption: THE CAFFEINE CANNON FIRES.
panels.bubble: ...I normally meander at a pace that is—

panels.caption: STAR-SLOTH IS MOVING AT SPEEDS NEVER RECORDED IN SLOTH HISTORY.
STAR-SLOTH SCURRIED LEFT, RIGHT, LEFT, INTO A CEILING.
OVER-CLOCK ADVANCES, EXPECTING EASY VICTORY.
panels.bubble: He always meandered so gracefully! Now he has scurried INTO my base! PERFECT!

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK DEPLOYS HIS BODYGUARD BOTS.
panels.bubble: Bodyguard Bots activate! A scurrying sloth is still a sloth! Catch him!

panels.caption: STAR-SLOTH SCURRIED INTO THE BODYGUARD BOTS.
BOTS DOWN. STAR-SLOTH SCURRIES ON.
panels.bubble: He is running through Over-Clock's base and destroying everything IN IT! By accident!

panels.caption: STAR-SLOTH SCURRIED THROUGH THE TROPHY ROOM.
panels.bubble: MY TROPHIES! MY THRONE! MY EVIL DESK CHAIR! HE SCURRIED THROUGH ALL OF IT!

panels.caption: EXPERIMENTS AND INVENTIONS EVERYWHERE.
panels.bubble: MY SHRINK RAY! MY GROW RAY! MY SLIGHTLY-SIDEWAYS RAY! HE SCURRIED THROUGH ALL OF THEM!

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK'S ENTIRE POWER GRID FLICKERS.
panels.bubble: MY LIGHTS! MY SCREENS! MY VILLAIN SPOTLIGHT! IT IS DARK IN HERE! I CANNOT LOOK MENACING IN THE DARK!

panels.caption: STAR-SLOTH SCURRIED INTO THE HALL OF TROPHIES.
JOLT WATCHES OPEN-MOUTHED.
panels.bubble: He meandered everywhere before. Always meandering. And now he scurried. And this is what happens. THIS IS WHAT HAPPENS.

panels.caption: ALL SEVEN ESCAPE PODS LAUNCH SIMULTANEOUSLY.
panels.bubble: MY ESCAPE PODS! ALL SEVEN! GONE! NOW I CANNOT ESCAPE! FROM MY OWN BASE!

panels.caption: STAR-SLOTH SCURRIED INTO THE MAIN VILLAIN CONTROL ROOM.
THE ENTIRE BASE GOES DARK. THEN RED. THEN DARK AGAIN.
panels.bubble: I have... nothing. Nothing works. He scurried through EVERYTHING.

panels.caption: THE CAFFEINE WEARS OFF. STAR-SLOTH COMES TO A HALT.
panels.bubble: ...I appear to have scurried...

panels.caption: STAR-SLOTH MEANDERED HOME THROUGH OVER-CLOCK'S RUINED BASE.
panels.bubble: ...I have meandered home...
My Caffeine-Cannon made him scurry into MY base and destroy MY things. I did this to myself.
He normally meandered. Over-Clock forced him to scurry. The scurrying destroyed Over-Clock's base. The plan worked. Not how Over-Clock planned.

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK DEFEATED. ACCIDENTALLY.
panels.bubble: He meandered to victory via accidental scurrying. He always meandered. The scurrying was the plan — just not Star-Sloth's plan. Over-Clock's base is rubble. Star-Sloth is already asleep again.

comics.title: 🤫 The Silent Treatment
comics.blurb: Over-Clock's spy won't crack under pressure. Star-Sloth sits silently until the spy begs him to stop.

words.definition: Quiet and careful so nobody notices.
To examine something very carefully.

panels.caption: IN OVER-CLOCK'S LAIR...
panels.bubble: I have placed a stealthy spy aboard their ship! He has the passcode to my fortress! They will NEVER crack him!
My agent is stealthy and uncrackable. The Admiral will try to scrutinise him. The Admiral cannot scrutinise a sandwich. MWAHAHA.

panels.caption: 🕵️ A SPY HAS BEEN CAPTURED! 🕵️
panels.bubble: SCRUTINISE HIM! Get the passcode! Use every technique! EVERY TECHNIQUE!

panels.caption: THE ADMIRAL SCRUTINISES THE SPY. SPY SAYS NOTHING.
panels.bubble: TELL ME THE PASSCODE! I AM SCRUTINISING YOU VERY HARD RIGHT NOW!

panels.caption: JOLT DEPLOYS THE TRUTH SCANNER.
panels.bubble: TRUTH SCANNER ACTIVATED! NOBODY CAN RESIST THIS! NOBODY!

panels.caption: THE SPY YAWNS.
panels.bubble: He yawned. At my truth scanner. He yawned AT it.

panels.caption: JOLT TRIES THE TICKLE PROTOCOL. THE SPY IS NOT TICKLISH.
panels.bubble: He is not ticklish. He is a stealthy spy. Of course he is not ticklish.

panels.caption: JOLT DEPLOYS THE NOISE MACHINE.
panels.bubble: THE NOISE MACHINE! IT PLAYS THE MOST ANNOYING SOUND IN THE UNIVERSE!

panels.caption: THE ADMIRAL CRACKS. COLLAPSES INTO A CHAIR.
panels.bubble: I cannot scrutinise him. He is too stealthy. Nothing worked. We are doomed.
What is he going to DO? He is just... sitting there. That is NOT how you scrutinise someone!

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK WATCHES IN GROWING HORROR.
panels.bubble: WHY IS NOTHING HAPPENING?! SAY SOMETHING! SCRUTINISE HIM! DO ANYTHING!

panels.caption: THREE HOURS. STAR-SLOTH HAS NOT MOVED.
THE SPY'S EYE TWITCHES.
panels.bubble: No no no. He is trained for THIS. He IS stealthy. Stay silent, agent! STAY SILENT!

panels.caption: THREE HOURS OF SILENCE. THE SPY CRACKS.
panels.sfx: FINE! Here is the passcode! Please DO something! Make a noise! ANYTHING!

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK DEPLOYS A RESCUE BOT.
panels.bubble: RESCUE BOT! Break the agent out! He is in an interrogation room with a SLOTH! Save him!

panels.caption: THE RESCUE BOT FREEZES UNDER STAR-SLOTH'S GAZE.
panels.bubble: The rescue bot has... stopped. It is just looking at Star-Sloth looking at it. This is the most serene standoff in history.

panels.caption: THREE HOURS AND TEN MINUTES. THE RESCUE BOT ALSO CRACKS.
panels.bubble: The rescue bot just... surrendered. A robot. Surrendered. To a sloth. Sitting in silence.

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK STARES AT HIS SCREEN IN HORROR.
panels.bubble: My agent, my rescue bot, and possibly my own willpower are all cracking. I cannot scrutinise this.

panels.caption: PASSCODE RETRIEVED.
panels.bubble: He cracked. My stealthy, uncrackable agent... cracked... because of a sloth sitting still for three hours.
He defeated a trained spy by doing NOTHING. I tried noise, scanning, and shouting. He tried silence. He won.

panels.caption: PASSCODE RETRIEVED. GALAXY SAFE. OVER-CLOCK CANNOT BELIEVE IT.
panels.bubble: He was stealthier than any spy. He scrutinised everything by scrutinising nothing. Pure genius. Over-Clock must be furious.

comics.title: 🍲 The Slow-Cooked Trap
comics.blurb: Over-Clock sends space-pirates. Star-Sloth's four-hour oatmeal floods the corridors and traps them all.

words.definition: Stayed longer than expected.
Moved slowly and lightly.

panels.caption: IN OVER-CLOCK'S LAIR...
panels.bubble: I have dispatched FORTY space-pirates! They have already drifted through every airlock! The ship is theirs in minutes! MWAHAHA!
The pirates drifted in silently. They linger near every corridor. Nothing can stop forty pirates who have already drifted inside. MWEHE HEE.

panels.caption: 6:00 AM. STAR-SLOTH MAKES OATMEAL.
panels.bubble: ...the aroma lingered... so nicely...

panels.caption: JOLT BURSTS IN.
panels.bubble: STAR-SLOTH! PIRATES HAVE DRIFTED THROUGH EVERY AIRLOCK! FORTY PIRATES! DO SOMETHING!

panels.caption: THE PIRATES STORM THE CORRIDORS.
panels.bubble: PIRATES IN CORRIDOR A! PIRATES IN CORRIDOR B! PIRATES EVERYWHERE! WE ARE OVERWHELMED!

panels.caption: ONE PIRATE SWATS JOLT ASIDE.
panels.bubble: OW.

panels.caption: JOLT FIRES THE STATIC CANNON AT THE PIRATES.
panels.bubble: STATIC CANNON! NOBODY RESISTS THE STATIC CANNON!

panels.caption: THE CANNON HITS THE CEILING. THE PIRATES LAUGH.
panels.bubble: I missed. Forty pirates. The pirates lingered in every corridor and I missed ALL FORTY.

panels.caption: 10:00 AM. THE OATMEAL HAS LINGERED ON THE HEAT FOR FOUR HOURS.
OATMEAL DRIFTED DOWN EVERY CORRIDOR.
panels.bubble: WHAT IS THAT?! WHAT IS DRIFTING DOWN THE CORRIDORS?! IT IS— PORRIDGE?!

panels.caption: STICKY PORRIDGE DRIFTED INTO EVERY CORRIDOR. PIRATES STUCK.
panels.bubble: The pirates have stopped. They are all stuck in... oatmeal?
MY PIRATES! They drifted into a PORRIDGE TRAP?! THIS STUFF IS EVERYWHERE! MY BOOTS! AGAIN!

panels.caption: THE PIRATES WALK AROUND THE ICE PATCH.
panels.bubble: They... went around it. My ice covered six square metres. They went around six square metres.

panels.caption: THE ADMIRAL RUNS INTO THE TANGLE WIRE.
panels.bubble: JOLT! I AM IN THE WIRE! I AM TANGLED! THE PIRATES ARE STEPPING OVER ME!

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK IS GLEEFUL.
panels.bubble: My pirates have lingered in every corridor for four hours and Jolt has achieved nothing. NOTHING. MWAHAHA.

panels.caption: THE OATMEAL HAS ALSO BEEN LINGERING FOR FOUR HOURS.
THE PIRATES WERE COLLECTED AND REMOVED.
panels.bubble: Forty pirates. Defeated by breakfast. He just lingered on making oatmeal for four hours. And it worked.

panels.caption: SHIP SECURED. OVER-CLOCK DEFEATED BY BREAKFAST.
panels.bubble: The pirates drifted in through every airlock. The oatmeal drifted into every corridor. One drifted in. The other drifted them out. Star-Sloth saved the ship with porridge.

comics.title: 🔐 The Password Panic
comics.blurb: Over-Clock triggers the self-destruct. Jolt panics through two wrong guesses. Star-Sloth is resolute to the last second.

words.definition: Based on reason and clear thinking, rather than emotion.
Very determined and sure.
Upset and unable to stay calm.

panels.caption: IN OVER-CLOCK'S LAIR...
panels.bubble: I have triggered their self-destruct REMOTELY! Ten minutes! Three attempts! The passcode is 47 characters long! MWAHAHAHA!
Nobody can be rational under this pressure. Nobody can stay resolute. They will become agitated. They will panic. And then— BOOM.

panels.caption: 💥 SELF-DESTRUCT INITIATED. 10:00. 3 ATTEMPTS. 💥
panels.bubble: Stay rational, everyone! We MUST be rational! Stay rational! BE RATIONAL! NOW!

panels.caption: JOLT TYPES THE FIRST ATTEMPT.
panels.bubble: PASSWORD ONE TWO THREE! OBVIOUSLY!

panels.caption: JOLT TYPES THE SECOND ATTEMPT.
panels.bubble: 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8! SURELY THAT IS IT!
ONE TRY LEFT. I AM NOT RATIONAL. I AM AGITATED. I HAVE NEVER BEEN THIS AGITATED.

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK IS CERTAIN OF VICTORY.
panels.bubble: One attempt remaining! Five minutes! They will be too agitated to be rational! VICTORY IS MINE!

panels.caption: STAR-SLOTH SLOWLY PUSHES JOLT ASIDE AND SITS AT THE CONSOLE.
panels.bubble: ...resolute...

panels.caption: TEN SECONDS.
panels.bubble: Ten... nine... eight... even the resolute break at the end! Seven... six... COME ON!

panels.caption: THREE SECONDS. STAR-SLOTH PRESSES THE FINAL KEY.
OVER-CLOCK WATCHES THE SCREEN. TWO SECONDS.
panels.bubble: Two seconds. One. Zero— wait. Zero. ZERO?! It DEACTIVATED?! HOW?!

panels.caption: THE SELF-DESTRUCT SCREEN READS: DEACTIVATED.
panels.bubble: DEACTIVATED! STAR-SLOTH GOT IT! AT ZERO! AT LITERALLY ZERO SECONDS! HE GOT IT!

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK CHECKS THE LOG. STAR-SLOTH ENTERED 47 CHARACTERS IN 47 SECONDS.
panels.bubble: One. Character. Per. Second. For forty-seven seconds. While agitated screaming surrounded him. While MY drone blared. While the timer hit zero.

panels.caption: DEACTIVATED.
panels.bubble: RESOLUTE?! HE WAS RESOLUTE?! HOW IS A SLOTH MORE RESOLUTE THAN ME?!
I was agitated. The Admiral was agitated. Over-Clock was certain. Star-Sloth was resolute. One of us got it right.

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK, ALONE IN HIS LAIR.
panels.bubble: I built a system to make them agitated. And one of them was so rational... so resolute... it did not matter.

panels.caption: EVERYONE LIVES.
panels.bubble: He was rational when I was agitated. Resolute when I was screaming. One character per second. He typed through the chaos and the countdown. Over-Clock is defeated. Again.

comics.title: 🪨 The Slow and Steady Stroll
comics.blurb: Over-Clock fires everything at the ship. Going 1 mph means the shields absorb every hit and his ammo runs out.

words.definition: Hard-working and careful.
Doing dangerous things without thinking.

panels.caption: IN OVER-CLOCK'S LAIR...
panels.bubble: They MUST cross the Criss-Cross Asteroid Field! Every reckless pilot who sped through it was destroyed! EVERY ONE!
I will be waiting with my cannon array! Speed through and hit asteroids! Diligent slowness? My cannons auto-target anything still. FOOLPROOF!

panels.caption: THE SHIP REACHES THE ASTEROID FIELD. JOLT GRABS THE CONTROLS.
panels.bubble: We need to be reckless and FAST! Being diligent wastes time! FULL SPEED AHEAD!

panels.caption: JOLT HITS THREE ASTEROIDS IN TWO SECONDS.
panels.bubble: Okay, three asteroids. That is a normal amount to hit immediately.

panels.caption: STAR-SLOTH TAKES THE WHEEL.
panels.bubble: ...diligent... and careful...

panels.caption: STAR-SLOTH DROPS SPEED TO 1 MPH.
panels.bubble: ONE MILE PER HOUR?! WE WILL BE SITTING DUCKS! RECKLESS SPEED IS THE ONLY OPTION!

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK FIRES EVERYTHING.
panels.bubble: CANNON ARRAY FIRE! They are moving too slowly to dodge! DESTROY THEM!

panels.caption: DILIGENT SLOWNESS. SHIELDS ABSORB EVERY TAP.
panels.bubble: Why. Will. They. Not. HIT?! FIRE THE BACKUP! FIRE IT ALL!

panels.caption: ALL OF IT BOUNCES OFF THE SLOW-MOVING SHIELDS.
panels.bubble: Every single shot bounces off. Because we are going one mile per hour. The shields are not even trying.

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK'S AMMUNITION RUNS OUT.
panels.bubble: EMPTY?! I wasted EVERYTHING on a diligent sloth going ONE MILE PER HOUR?!

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK, SURROUNDED BY EMPTY AMMO CASINGS.
panels.bubble: I built a TRAP for reckless pilots. And a diligent sloth at one mile per hour walked straight through it. I hate diligent sloths.

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK DEPLOYS HIS COMBAT BOTS.
panels.bubble: COMBAT BOTS! Fly out and STOP THEM! They cannot be diligent through combat bots!

panels.caption: JOLT DEFENDS THE SHIP AGAINST THE BOTS.
panels.bubble: I WILL FIGHT THEM! I AM VERY RECKLESS ABOUT THIS AND THAT IS FINE!

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK RAMS HIS OWN SHIP INTO THE PATH.
panels.bubble: I WILL BLOCK THEM MYSELF! MY OWN SHIP! RIGHT IN THE PATH! THEY CANNOT GO AROUND ME!
We are almost out. Over-Clock has used every cannon. Every bot. His own ship. Everything. And we are still going. One. Mile. Per. Hour.

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK RUNS OUT OF SHIP FUEL TRYING TO BLOCK THEM.
panels.bubble: EMPTY?! I am out of fuel?! I rammed my own ship into their path so many times I ran OUT?! I HATE DILIGENT SLOTHS.

panels.caption: LAST ASTEROID CLEARED. FULL CLEAR.
panels.bubble: CLEAR! WE ARE THROUGH! THROUGH! NOT A SCRATCH! ONE MILE PER HOUR! CLEAR!

panels.caption: THROUGH WITHOUT A SCRATCH.
panels.bubble: Reckless speed would have destroyed us. Diligent slowness meant Over-Clock wasted all his ammunition on a ship moving at walking pace. Beautiful. Star-Sloth wins.

comics.title: 🎯 The Pre-Emptive Strike
comics.blurb: Over-Clock's laser fires at noon. Star-Sloth's ship drifts into the barrel by accident at 11:59. Victory by mistake.

words.definition: Moved slowly and lightly.
Happening at a particularly suitable or favourable time.
Moved around without a clear plan.

panels.caption: IN OVER-CLOCK'S LAIR. 6:00 AM.
panels.bubble: My laser fires at NOON — the most opportune moment in galactic history! Six hours of charging! NOTHING CAN STOP IT! MWAHAHA!
The target is locked. The moment is so opportune. They could never get in my way in time. Not even that wandering sloth.

panels.caption: 7:00 AM. STAR-SLOTH LEANS ON THE LAUNCH LEVER. BY ACCIDENT.
THE SHIP ENTERS A LAUNCH SEQUENCE.
panels.bubble: THE SHIP HAS WANDERED INTO A LAUNCH SEQUENCE! STAR-SLOTH?! STAR-SLOTH?!

panels.caption: THE SHIP DRIFTED. AT 1 MPH. HEADING NOWHERE IN PARTICULAR.
panels.bubble: ...I appear to have wandered... peaceful...
WE ARE DRIFTING TOWARD OVER-CLOCK'S SECTOR! TURN AROUND! STAR-SLOTH! WAKE UP!

panels.caption: 9:00 AM. OVER-CLOCK NOTICES SOMETHING ON HIS SCANNER.
panels.bubble: Something has wandered into my sector. Tiny. Slow. One mile per hour. Nothing to worry about.

panels.caption: THE SHIP HAS DRIFTED INTO OVER-CLOCK'S OUTER DEFENCES.
panels.bubble: WE HAVE DRIFTED INTO HIS OUTER DEFENCES! HOW?! WHY?! TURN AROUND!

panels.caption: 11:58 AM.
panels.bubble: It has drifted INTO the cannon barrel approach. That cannot be intentional. THAT CANNOT BE INTENTIONAL.

panels.caption: 11:59. THE SHIP DRIFTED DIRECTLY INTO THE CANNON BARREL.
panels.bubble: We have drifted into the barrel. We have drifted. INTO. THE BARREL.
...opportune position...
IF I FIRE — I DESTROY MY OWN BARREL! IF I DON'T FIRE — I MISS THE OPPORTUNE MOMENT! AAAAAH!

panels.caption: NOON.
panels.bubble: MY OWN BASE! MY OWN OPPORTUNE MOMENT! RUINED BY A WANDERING SLOTH WHO DRIFTED IN BY ACCIDENT!

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK'S CANNON DESTROYS ITSELF.
panels.bubble: The base is destroyed. We are fine. He wandered in. And Over-Clock's own weapon destroyed his own base.
HE SAVED THE GALAXY BY FALLING ASLEEP ON THE LAUNCH LEVER?!

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK TRIES EVERYTHING. UNPLUGS THE BASE.
panels.bubble: SELF-DESTRUCT ABORT! POWER DOWN! UNPLUGGING EVERYTHING! The backup is... also the cannon. Of course.

panels.caption: JOLT CALCULATES THE ANGLE.
panels.bubble: We wandered 4.3 metres into the barrel. The cannon fires OUTWARD — we are at the safe end. Over-Clock cannot fire without destroying his own base. We drifted into the safest spot.

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK, SITTING IN HIS RUINED BASE.
panels.bubble: The most opportune moment in history. Ruined. Because a sloth wandered and drifted into my cannon barrel. BY ACCIDENT.

panels.caption: STAR-SLOTH THOUGHT HE WAS GOING FOR A DRIVE.
panels.bubble: His wandering and drifting was the most opportune thing in galactic history. Over-Clock aimed for the most opportune moment. Star-Sloth wandered into it first. By mistake. Star-Sloth wins.

comics.title: 🏅 The Un-Chase Scene
comics.blurb: Over-Clock's swift thief steals the Admiral's medal. Everyone chases. Star-Sloth waits. The thief runs into his hand.

words.definition: Calm and peaceful.
Calm and peaceful, without strong movement or emotion.
Very fast.

panels.caption: IN OVER-CLOCK'S LAIR...
panels.bubble: I have sent my most swift thief! He is the swiftest creature in the galaxy! He will steal the Admiral's medal and nobody can catch him! TOO SWIFT!
He is swift. He runs laps around any pursuer. No serene, placid creature can catch something swift. Nobody is more swift than my thief. MWAHAHA.

panels.caption: THE ADMIRAL'S MEDAL HAS BEEN STOLEN!
panels.bubble: A SWIFT THIEF! HE IS TOO SWIFT! AFTER HIM! ALL UNITS — AFTER HIM!

panels.caption: JOLT GIVES CHASE.
panels.bubble: I AM ALSO SWIFT! I AM ALMOST AS SWIFT! ...I am not catching him.

panels.caption: THE THIEF RUNS LAPS AROUND THE CIRCULAR STATION.
panels.bubble: HE IS LAPPING US! HE IS LAPPING THE CHASERS! A THIEF IS LAPPING THE SPACE NAVY!

panels.caption: LAP 2. THE THIEF DODGES THE NET. IT CATCHES THE ADMIRAL.
panels.bubble: JOLT! I AM IN THE NET! THE WRONG ONE IS IN THE NET! JOLT!

panels.caption: LAP 3. OVER-CLOCK WATCHES, CONFIDENT.
panels.bubble: A serene, placid sloth cannot catch a swift thief. This is mathematically impossible. I checked.

panels.caption: STAR-SLOTH DOES NOT CHASE. ONE STEP FORWARD. HAND OUTSTRETCHED.
panels.bubble: ...serene...

panels.caption: LAP 4. JOLT TRIES THE SLIPPERY FLOOR PROTOCOL.
panels.bubble: SLIPPERY FLOOR! ...I forgot the floor was slippery. OW.

panels.caption: LAP 7. JOLT WHEEZES.
panels.bubble: Star-Sloth is so placid! HOW is he so serene while I am collapsing?! HOW?!

panels.caption: STAR-SLOTH REMAINS SERENE. HAND OUTSTRETCHED.
panels.bubble: ...placid...

panels.caption: LAP 8. THE SWIFT THIEF RUNS A FULL CIRCLE AND SPRINTS INTO STAR-SLOTH'S OPEN HAND.
panels.bubble: ...I simply stayed serene...

panels.caption: THE MEDAL RETURNS TO THE ADMIRAL.
panels.bubble: HE STOOD STILL! HE STOOD STILL AND THE THIEF RAN INTO HIM! MY SWIFT THIEF! DEFEATED BY STANDING STILL!
He caught the thief by not chasing. He was serene. He was placid. He just waited.

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK CANNOT ACCEPT THIS.
panels.bubble: He ran into a HAND. My SWIFT thief ran into a HAND that was STANDING STILL. Mathematically impossible.

panels.caption: THE THIEF IS ESCORTED OUT.
panels.bubble: The thief said, and I quote: "I have been defeated by a sloth who was just standing there." Swift enough to run eight laps. Not swift enough to see a calm sloth.

panels.caption: STAR-SLOTH SITS BACK IN HIS CHAIR.
panels.bubble: ...I was simply serene and placid...

panels.caption: OVER-CLOCK, IN HIS LAIR. FURIOUS.
panels.bubble: The serene, placid sloth caught my swift thief by being neither swift nor chasing. This should not be possible.

panels.caption: MEDAL RETURNED. OVER-CLOCK FURIOUS. NOT A DROP OF SWEAT.
panels.bubble: Serene. Placid. Correct. The swift thief was stopped by the stillest hero. Star-Sloth stood in one spot, raised one hand, and caught a creature running at sixty miles per hour. Over-Clock is baffled again. We all are.
